channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Three Women Rape Chitungwiza Man, Steal Cash
item.description: By A Correspondent| A 45-year-old man from Chitungwiza was allegedly sexually assaulted by three women on Sunday after they reportedly... Continue reading "Three Women Rape Chitungwiza Man, Steal Cash" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: REPLY TO THE SECOND READING DEBATE CONSTITUTION OF ZIMBABWE AMENDMENT BILL (NO. 3), 2026
item.description: By Ziyambi Ziyambi Introduction Mr. Speaker Sir, I rise to reply to the Second Reading debate on the Constitution of Zimbabwe (Amendment No.3) H.B.1. Bill, 2026. Before doing so, may I thank Honourable Members for their spirited and constructive engagement of the Bill. Over seven sitting days, members from every province and both sides of [...] The post REPLY TO THE SECOND READING DEBATE CONSTITUTION OF ZIMBABWE AMENDMENT BILL (NO. 3), 2026 appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Zimbabwe platinum producers owed $228 million in unpaid export earnings
item.description: The country requires all exporters to convert 30% of their proceeds into local currency, but the government is frequently behind in paying out. (via Mining) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Mining

item.title: 20 Arrested as Harare Launches Fresh Crackdown on Littering @PoliceZimbabwe
item.description: 20 Arrested as Harare Launches Fresh Crackdown on Littering Twenty people were arrested in Harare’s central business district on Wednesday as city authorities intensified efforts to tackle littering and improve cleanliness in the capital. The operation was carried out jointly by the Harare City Council, the Environmental Management Agency (EMA) and the Zimbabwe Republic Police [...] The post 20 Arrested as Harare Launches Fresh Crackdown on Littering appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Sahrawi Endorses Mnangagwa’s Sanctions Rhetoric As Zimbabwe Burns
item.description: Tinashe Sambiri| President Emmerson Mnangagwa on Thursday hosted a delegation from the self-declared Sahrawi Arab Democratic Republic (SADR) at State... Continue reading "Sahrawi Endorses Mnangagwa’s Sanctions Rhetoric As Zimbabwe Burns" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe lithium sector faces refinery bottleneck as miners push to delay 2027 export ban
item.description: HARARE – Zimbabwe’s rapidly expanding lithium sector is entering a critical policy test as miners push for more time to build domestic processing plants ahead of a scheduled export ban on lithium concentrates in 2027. According to Business Insider Africa, in a report headlined “Africa’s top lithium producer faces refinery bottleneck as miners seek more [...] The post Zimbabwe lithium sector faces refinery bottleneck as miners push to delay 2027 export ban appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Zimbabwe Soldier Sentenced After Robbing Roman Catholic Priest
item.description: Court hands down sentence to Zimbabwe soldier convicted of robbing a Roman Catholic priest in a shocking incident. The post Zimbabwe Soldier Sentenced After Robbing Roman Catholic Priest appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Wicknell Chivayo Granted Eswatini Citizenship After Meeting King Mswati III @wicknellchivayo
item.description: Wicknell Chivayo Granted Eswatini Citizenship After Meeting King Mswati III Zimbabwean businessman and philanthropist Wicknell Chivayo says he has been granted Eswatini citizenship and presented with a diplomatic passport following a meeting with King Mswati III at the royal palace. Chivayo described the audience with the Eswatini monarch as one of the greatest honours of [...] The post Wicknell Chivayo Granted Eswatini Citizenship After Meeting King Mswati III appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Econet’s Smart4U Bundle draws customer backlash @bulawayo24 @econetzimbabwe
item.description: Econet Wireless Zimbabwe is facing growing criticism from subscribers over its Smart4U bundle, with customers complaining that the package is being depleted far more quickly than expected despite bein... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: CCC defectors: It is my turn now to feel the pain @bulawayo24
item.description: I NO not remember the exact date in 2023, but I remember the moment with painful clarity. It was the day the Nomination Court sat for the 2023 general elections. I was in Chambers, minding my own busi... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Winehouse Returns to Harare Following Sold-Out Success and Regional Expansion
item.description: Following a sold-out edition at La Parada Ba Noakes earlier this year, Winehouse is set to return to Harare on 9 August 2026, bringing its celebrated blend of wine culture, house music and social connection back to one of its most passionate audiences. Taking place at La Parada Ba Noakes, Bay Noakes Road, Harare, [...] The post Winehouse Returns to Harare Following Sold-Out Success and Regional Expansion appeared first on ZIMBUZZ. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbuzz

item.title: RTG Unveils Father’s Day Experiences Across Zimbabwe, From Victoria Falls Dining to Nyanga Adventures
item.description: As families prepare to celebrate Father’s Day on June 21, Rainbow Tourism Group (RTG) has launched a nationwide lineup of dining, entertainment and leisure experiences aimed at honouring fathers across its hospitality properties. The hospitality group announced a range of curated events spanning Victoria Falls, Harare, Bulawayo, Kadoma and Nyanga, offering everything from traditional [...] The post RTG Unveils Father’s Day Experiences Across Zimbabwe, From Victoria Falls Dining to Nyanga Adventures appeared first on ZIMBUZZ. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbuzz

item.title: RTG Invests $2 Million to Modernise Montclair Resort as Eastern Highlands Tourism Grows
item.description: Rainbow Tourism Group (RTG) has launched a US$2 million refurbishment of Montclair Resort & Conference Hotel in Nyanga, a major investment aimed at modernising the property and strengthening the Eastern Highlands’ position as one of Zimbabwe’s leading tourism destinations. The upgrade, which began on June 1 and is scheduled for completion by July 31, [...] The post RTG Invests $2 Million to Modernise Montclair Resort as Eastern Highlands Tourism Grows appeared first on ZIMBUZZ. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbuzz

item.title: Quiet Money, Deep Roots: How the Oak Foundation Backs Zimbabwe’s Communities
item.description: The Geneva-based Oak Foundation has funded Zimbabwean causes since 1983. In 2025 its Zimbabwe programme made USD 7.9 million in grants, backing palliative care, landmine clearance, regenerative farming and care for children who have lost parents. #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tapiwa Hillary Phillipo
